## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or config
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Restructuring without behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance (CI, deps, cleanup)

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash -n` passes on all modified `.sh` files
- [ ] Tested on target platform (macOS / Arch Linux)
- [ ] Stow structure is valid (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] Configs use guards (`command -v`, `[[ -f ]]`) for missing tools
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (uses `$HOME`, `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME`, etc.)
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
